raw_excerpt:
# R5 EDA — Summary

50 products × 3 days (R4-d2/d3/d4 in the Prosperity-5 numbering). Per-product
metrics averaged across the 3 days unless noted.

## Headline findings

1. **Almost everything is non-stationary at the level.** ADF + KPSS jointly
   classify 143 / 150 product-days as `non_stationary` (random-walk-ish).
   Only 7 product-days hit `diff_stationary` (no level mean reversion, only
   first-differences are stationary). **Static-fair mean reversion strategies
   like R4's "method A" will NOT work here** — every fair model needs to
   handle drift (linear trend, EMA, or cointegration with a paired product).

2. **Spreads are wide, not 1.** Average spread ranges from **6.4 ticks
   (ROBOT_IRONING)** to **17.8 ticks (SNACKPACK_STRAWBERRY)** — none of the
   50 products have spread=1
